interfaces.name: RoutingMatrix
interfaces.signalFlowRole: Routes internal buffer channels to output channels

parameterGroups.label: Output
parameterGroups.rationale: Base-class output controls inherited from ModulatorSynth

parameters.name: Gain
parameters.description: The output volume as normalised linear gain (0.0 to 1.0), not decibels.

parameterGroups.label: Voice Management
parameterGroups.rationale: Base-class voice parameters inherited from ModulatorSynth - largely irrelevant for this module

parameters.name: Kill Fade Time
parameters.description: The fade out time in milliseconds when voices are killed by exceeding the voice limit or by a voice killer

standaloneModChains.name: Pitch Modulation
standaloneModChains.note: Inherited from ModulatorSynth base class - not used by SendContainer (no oscillator/pitch concept)

gaps.question: How exactly does the SendContainer receive audio from SendEffect instances? What is the render cycle: does addSendSignal accumulate into an internal buffer, then renderNextBlockWithModulators processes that buffer?
gaps.context: Core signal path - this module's entire purpose is routing, so the send/receive mechanism is the signal path.

gaps.question: The FX chain uses NoMidiInputConstrainer. Does this mean only MasterEffect-type effects can be added? Are polyphonic effects forced to monophonic?
gaps.context: Users need to know what effects they can place in the container's FX chain.

gaps.question: The routing matrix maps internal channels to output channels. How does the channel offset from SendEffect interact with the routing matrix in SendContainer?
gaps.context: Users building multichannel send/return setups need to understand the channel routing.

gaps.question: SendContainer is constructed with 1 voice and doesn't seem to have a voice-per-note model. Is the per-voice inference from the base type accurate, or is this effectively monophonic?
gaps.context: Need to clarify whether VoiceLimit/KillFadeTime parameters are meaningful.

gaps.question: The Gain Modulation chain is inherited. Is it actually applied in renderNextBlockWithModulators, or does the override skip the base-class gain logic?
gaps.context: Need to know if the Gain parameter and Gain Modulation chain actually work for this module.

gaps.question: Can multiple SendEffect instances route to the same SendContainer? Does addSendSignal use addFrom (additive mixing)?
gaps.context: Users need to know if this works as a summing bus for multiple sends.

notes: SendContainer is technically a SoundGenerator (ModulatorSynth) but it doesn't generate sound. It acts as the receive end of a send/return routing pair with SendEffect. The base-class parameters (VoiceLimit, KillFadeTime, Pitch Modulation) are likely irrelevant since this module is constructed with 1 voice and has no oscillator. The FX chain is the primary user-facing feature - it's where users place effects that process the received send signal.
